{{Quote|Oddly enough, people do sometimes mistake me for a droid.|Entoo Nee|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Entoo Needaan E-elz''', a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] who preferred to go by '''Entoo Nee''', was an employee of [[Jorj Car'das]] after Car'das retired to [[Exocron]]. He was often mistaken for a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] given his name and odd [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]-like behavior.

E-elz met with smuggler [[Talon Karrde]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dayark]], masquerading as an aide to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jutka]] of the [[Kathol Republic]]. Later, Karrde landed at [[Rintatta City]] on the planet [[Exocron]], where he met E-elz once again. E-elz led Talon Karrde to Jorj Car'das.

==Behind the scenes==
Entoo Nee's full name was "Entoo Needaan E-elz", which is phonetically similar to "[[Anthony Daniels]]," who played [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. [[Timothy Zahn]] named the character after Daniels.<ref name="Zahn">[http://www.theforce.net/jedicouncil/trivia/misctrivia.asp] ''Miscellaneous Trivia''</ref> In one instance, the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' misspelled E-elz's name as "Entoo Needan E-elz."<ref name="CSWE Tarmidian">{{CSWECite|II|407|Old Tarmidian}}</ref>
